input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

recent_thinks: [0-2] Centered white text displays "- Nintendo -" on the top line with "Presents" directly underneath on a solid black background. During this interval, the bright white lettering quickly fades away, diminishing in opacity until only a faint, ghostly trace remains visible against the dark screen.

[2-4] Following the fade to black, a title screen appears featuring the text "SUPER MARIO WORLD" in large, multi-colored, bubbly letters centered on a black background. Beneath the logo sits a white egg with green spots. The scene is framed by a border of tan stone blocks, and small blue copyright text reading "1990-1991 Nintendo" is visible at the bottom.

samples.output: <think>The black background transitions to a bright outdoor scene with blue sky, grey mountain, green bushes, and brown ground. A small figure in red overalls stands left while an orange dinosaur-like creature appears right, replacing the white egg. A menu overlay lists save slots "MARIO A", "MARIO B", "MARIO C", and "ERASE DATA" with a red cursor arrow.</think><answer></answer>

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

compressed_segments.text: [0-2] Centered white text "- Nintendo -" and "Presents" displays on a black background, quickly fading until faint. [2-4] A title screen appears with "SUPER MARIO WORLD" in multi-colored bubbly letters above a spotted white egg, framed by tan stone blocks and "1990-1991 Nintendo" text. [4-6] The background transitions to an outdoor scene with blue sky and mountains. Mario stands left while an orange dinosaur appears right. A menu lists "MARIO A", "MARIO B", "MARIO C", and "ERASE DATA" with a red cursor. [6-8] The menu changes to "1 PLAYER GAME" and "2 PLAYER GAME". The cursor points to the top option before the screen rapidly fades into darkness.

recent_thinks: [8-10] The dark screen fades into a bright overhead map labeled "YOSHI'S HOUSE" at the top. A small figure in red overalls appears on a path surrounded by green hills and blue water. The figure is then shown riding a white dinosaur-like creature, while a counter reading "x3" appears near the top left corner next to a small icon.

[10-12] The map header text updates to "YOSHI'S ISLAND 1" while the small figure in red overalls stands alone on the path, separated from the white dinosaur. Finally, the view cuts to a black background featuring the centered yellow text "MARIO START !".

[12-14] The map cuts to black with yellow text 'MARIO START !'. The view shifts to a side-scrolling scene with a character in red overalls on grass. A display appears at the top showing lives, score, time, and coins. On the right, an orange enemy sits on a dirt slope before large blue hills.

[14-16] The character in red overalls jumps into the air while the timer counts down from 300. The orange enemy moves from the dirt slope to the ground, appearing flattened. A gold coin appears on the far right edge as the character travels rightward across the grassy terrain.

[16-18] The character in red overalls lands on the grass and runs right. A gold coin floating near a blue pillar disappears, updating the top-right display to show one coin and 1000 points. The timer decreases to 294. The flattened orange enemy is no longer visible as the character moves forward across the green terrain.

[18-20] A large black cannon structure with a red mouth and white teeth appears on the left side. A blue dinosaur-like enemy stands on the grass to the right. The character in red overalls jumps into the air. The timer at the top counts down from 293 to 291 seconds.

[20-22] A blue dinosaur-like enemy stands on the left grass while a winged question block floats above. The character in red overalls runs rightward. The floating block is replaced by a brown square, and the enemy is no longer visible as the timer reaches 289 seconds.

queries.question: Has the step 'Mario jumps over bush' been done by now?

samples.output: <think>The character in red overalls jumps to strike a floating brown block, causing a red mushroom with white spots to emerge. As the character collects the mushroom, the number 1000 flashes above their head, and their sprite instantly grows larger while the timer decreases to 286.</think><answer>Yes</answer>

compressed_segments.text: [0-2] Centered white text "- Nintendo -" and "Presents" displays on a black background, quickly fading until faint. [2-4] A title screen appears with "SUPER MARIO WORLD" in multi-colored bubbly letters above a spotted white egg, framed by tan stone blocks and "1990-1991 Nintendo" text. [4-6] The background transitions to an outdoor scene with blue sky and mountains. Mario stands left while an orange dinosaur appears right. A menu lists "MARIO A", "MARIO B", "MARIO C", and "ERASE DATA" with a red cursor. [6-8] The menu changes to "1 PLAYER GAME" and "2 PLAYER GAME". The cursor points to the top option before the screen rapidly fades into darkness.

[14-16] Mario jumps while the timer counts down from 300. An orange enemy moves from a dirt slope to the ground, appearing flattened. A gold coin appears on the far right as Mario travels rightward across grassy terrain. [16-18] Mario lands on the grass and runs right. A gold coin near a blue pillar disappears, updating the display to show 1 coin and 1000 points. The timer decreases to 294. The flattened orange enemy is no longer visible. [18-20] A large black cannon structure with a red mouth and white teeth appears on the left. A blue dinosaur-like enemy stands on the grass to the right. Mario jumps into the air. The timer counts down from 293 to 291 seconds. [20-22] The blue dinosaur-like enemy stands on the left grass while a winged question block floats above. Mario runs rightward. The floating block is replaced by a brown square, and the enemy is no longer visible as the timer reaches 289 seconds.

[10-12] The map header reads "YOSHI'S ISLAND 1" before the screen cuts to black with centered yellow text "MARIO START !". [12-14] Gameplay begins in a side-scrolling view with a HUD displaying "MARIO x 5", "TIME 300", and coin counts. A small character in red overalls stands on grass while an orange enemy sits on a dirt slope against blue hills. [22-24] The character strikes a floating brown block, releasing a red mushroom with white spots. Collecting it causes "1000" to flash, the character sprite grows larger, and the timer decreases to 286. [24-26] The enlarged character moves right as a green pipe emerges diagonally. A blue dinosaur-like enemy stands atop the pipe while another identical enemy appears on the far left, with the timer ticking down to 282.

recent_thinks: [8-10] The dark screen fades into a bright overhead map labeled "YOSHI'S HOUSE" at the top. A small figure in red overalls appears on a path surrounded by green hills and blue water. The figure is then shown riding a white dinosaur-like creature, while a counter reading "x3" appears near the top left corner next to a small icon.

[26-28] The large character in red overalls moves from the grass to stand atop the rim of the diagonal green pipe. The blue dinosaur-like enemy previously on the pipe is now standing on the grass to the left of the structure. The timer counts down from 282 to 281 seconds as the character balances on the pipe.

[28-30] The large character in red overalls jumps from the green pipe towards the right, hovering above a dirt slope near a floating gold coin. Two blue dinosaur-like enemies stand on separate brown hills below as the timer decreases from 281 to 279 seconds against a blue sky background.

[30-32] The large character in red overalls leaps rightward through the air toward a floating gold coin. Below, blue dinosaur-like enemies stand on brown dirt slopes. The timer counts down from 279 to 276 seconds as the figure traverses the gap between the hills against a blue sky background.

[32-34] The large character in red lands on the grass as a red mushroom with white spots floats in the air above. To the right, a blue dinosaur-like enemy stands on the ground while the timer counts down from 275 to 272 seconds against a backdrop of blue hills and white clouds.

[34-36] The large character collects the floating red mushroom, updating the top item box to show a mushroom icon and increasing the score to 3000. A red Piranha Plant with white spots emerges from a purple pipe on the right side. A blue dinosaur-like enemy stands on the grass to the left as the character runs forward.

The timer decreases to 294. The flattened orange enemy is no longer visible as the character moves forward across the green terrain.
[[18, 20]] A large black cannon structure with a red mouth and white teeth appears on the left side. A blue dinosaur-like enemy stands on the grass to the right. The character in red overalls jumps into the air. The timer at the top counts down from 293 to 291 seconds.
[[22, 24]] The character in red overalls jumps to strike a floating brown block, causing a red mushroom with white spots to emerge. As the character collects the mushroom, the number 1000 flashes above their head, and their sprite instantly grows larger while the timer decreases to 286.

compressed_segments.text: [0-2] Centered white text "- Nintendo -" and "Presents" displays on a black background, quickly fading until faint. [2-4] A title screen appears with "SUPER MARIO WORLD" in multi-colored bubbly letters above a spotted white egg, framed by tan stone blocks and "1990-1991 Nintendo" text. [4-6] The background transitions to an outdoor scene with blue sky and mountains. Mario stands left while an orange dinosaur appears right. A menu lists "MARIO A", "MARIO B", "MARIO C", and "ERASE DATA" with a red cursor. [6-8] The menu changes to "1 PLAYER GAME" and "2 PLAYER GAME". The cursor points to the top option before the screen rapidly fades into darkness.

[14-16] Mario jumps while the timer counts down from 300. An orange enemy moves from a dirt slope to the ground, appearing flattened. A gold coin appears on the far right as Mario travels rightward across grassy terrain. [16-18] Mario lands on the grass and runs right. A gold coin near a blue pillar disappears, updating the display to show 1 coin and 1000 points. The timer decreases to 294. The flattened orange enemy is no longer visible. [18-20] A large black cannon structure with a red mouth and white teeth appears on the left. A blue dinosaur-like enemy stands on the grass to the right. Mario jumps into the air. The timer counts down from 293 to 291 seconds. [20-22] The blue dinosaur-like enemy stands on the left grass while a winged question block floats above. Mario runs rightward. The floating block is replaced by a brown square, and the enemy is no longer visible as the timer reaches 289 seconds.

[10-12] The map header reads "YOSHI'S ISLAND 1" before the screen cuts to black with centered yellow text "MARIO START !". [12-14] Gameplay begins in a side-scrolling view with a HUD displaying "MARIO x 5", "TIME 300", and coin counts. A small character in red overalls stands on grass while an orange enemy sits on a dirt slope against blue hills. [22-24] The character strikes a floating brown block, releasing a red mushroom with white spots. Collecting it causes "1000" to flash, the character sprite grows larger, and the timer decreases to 286. [24-26] The enlarged character moves right as a green pipe emerges diagonally. A blue dinosaur-like enemy stands atop the pipe while another identical enemy appears on the far left, with the timer ticking down to 282.

recent_thinks: [8-10] The dark screen fades into a bright overhead map labeled "YOSHI'S HOUSE" at the top. A small figure in red overalls appears on a path surrounded by green hills and blue water. The figure is then shown riding a white dinosaur-like creature, while a counter reading "x3" appears near the top left corner next to a small icon.

[26-28] The large character in red overalls moves from the grass to stand atop the rim of the diagonal green pipe. The blue dinosaur-like enemy previously on the pipe is now standing on the grass to the left of the structure. The timer counts down from 282 to 281 seconds as the character balances on the pipe.

[28-30] The large character in red overalls jumps from the green pipe towards the right, hovering above a dirt slope near a floating gold coin. Two blue dinosaur-like enemies stand on separate brown hills below as the timer decreases from 281 to 279 seconds against a blue sky background.

[30-32] The large character in red overalls leaps rightward through the air toward a floating gold coin. Below, blue dinosaur-like enemies stand on brown dirt slopes. The timer counts down from 279 to 276 seconds as the figure traverses the gap between the hills against a blue sky background.

[32-34] The large character in red lands on the grass as a red mushroom with white spots floats in the air above. To the right, a blue dinosaur-like enemy stands on the ground while the timer counts down from 275 to 272 seconds against a backdrop of blue hills and white clouds.

[34-36] The large character collects the floating red mushroom, updating the top item box to show a mushroom icon and increasing the score to 3000. A red Piranha Plant with white spots emerges from a purple pipe on the right side. A blue dinosaur-like enemy stands on the grass to the left as the character runs forward.

queries.question: Which text option is indicated by the red cursor on the game selection screen? A. 2 PLAYER GAME B. 1 PLAYER GAME C. MARIO START ! D. YOSHI'S HOUSE

samples.output: <think>The large character in red stands beside the purple pipe as the red spotted plant enemy retracts into it. Gold coins appear vertically on the far right edge. The blue dinosaur-like enemy is partially visible on the far left. The timer counts down from 259 to 258 seconds.</think><answer></answer>

The cursor points to the top option before the screen rapidly fades into darkness.

[14-16] Mario jumps while the timer counts down from 300. An orange enemy moves from a dirt slope to the ground, appearing flattened. A gold coin appears on the far right as Mario travels rightward across grassy terrain. [16-18] Mario lands on the grass and runs right. A gold coin near a blue pillar disappears, updating the display to show 1 coin and 1000 points. The timer decreases to 294. The flattened orange enemy is no longer visible. [18-20] A large black cannon structure with a red mouth and white teeth appears on the left. A blue dinosaur-like enemy stands on the grass to the right. Mario jumps into the air. A small character in red overalls stands on grass while an orange enemy sits on a dirt slope against blue hills. [22-24] The character strikes a floating brown block, releasing a red mushroom with white spots. Collecting it causes "1000" to flash, the character sprite grows larger, and the timer decreases to 286. [24-26] The enlarged character moves right as a green pipe emerges diagonally. A blue dinosaur-like enemy stands atop the pipe while another identical enemy appears on the far left, with the timer ticking down to 282.

[32-34] The character lands on the grass as a red mushroom with white spots floats above, and a blue dinosaur-like enemy stands to the right while the timer decreases from 275 to 272. [34-36] Upon collecting the mushroom, the top item box updates to show a mushroom icon and the score increases to 3000; a red Piranha Plant with white spots emerges from a purple pipe on the right. [36-38] The character stands beside the purple pipe as the red spotted plant enemy retracts into it, gold coins appear vertically on the far right, and the timer counts down from 259 to 258.
